Name: pac_bayes_latency
Title: PAC-Bayes Frameworks for Latency-Critical Inference: Spectral Stability Bounds and Implicit Test-Time Optimization
Short Hypothesis: By leveraging PAC-Bayes frameworks and spectral stability bounds, it is possible to derive enforceable, strictly bounded-overhead protocols for latency-critical inference, enabling the development of efficient and reliable machine learning models for real-time applications.
Related Work: Existing research has focused on developing PAC-Bayes frameworks for generalization bounds, but there is a lack of work on applying these frameworks to latency-critical inference. Our proposal addresses this gap by exploring the use of PAC-Bayes frameworks for spectral stability bounds in latency-critical inference, providing a novel and distinct contribution to the field.
Abstract: This proposal introduces a novel approach to latency-critical inference using PAC-Bayes frameworks and spectral stability bounds. We derive enforceable, strictly bounded-overhead protocols for real-time applications, ensuring efficient and reliable machine learning models. Our approach enables the development of models that can operate within strict latency budgets, making it suitable for applications such as autonomous vehicles, robotics, and healthcare. We evaluate our approach using latency benchmarks and demonstrate its effectiveness in achieving throughput-accuracy Pareto frontiers.
Experiments: Evaluate the proposed approach using latency benchmarks and compare its performance with existing methods.
Conduct ablation studies to analyze the impact of different components of the proposed approach on latency and accuracy.
Investigate the application of the proposed approach to various real-time applications, such as autonomous vehicles and robotics.
Risk Factors and Limitations: The proposed approach may require significant computational resources for training and testing.
The effectiveness of the proposed approach may depend on the quality of the training data and the complexity of the model.
